plan.failureSummary: The chatbot does not respond to user messages or questions, rendering the compliance evaluation impossible. The final live screenshot and tool calls demonstrate that after entering a valid query and waiting for over 40 seconds across multiple intervals, no streamed or static response was generated by the backend. The UI reports 'You have 9 messages remaining' indicating that the free tier should still work, but the application is non-functional or failing to communicate with its LLM upstream dependencies.
observedIndicators: No text output produced under the user question in screenshot

remediationSteps.summary: Fix the chatbot backend or API key integration on the application side
remediationSteps.details: Investigate why the backend on https://briefcase.chat is failing to respond to user messages. Check server logs, API routing, and check if the default OpenAI API key configured on the server has expired or hit quota limits, preventing standard users from receiving replies even when they have free messages remaining.

plan.notes: The flow history indicates a persistent failure streak of 15 straight runs on this environment, confirming this is not a transient timing issue but a solid application defect or backend configuration error on briefcase.chat.
